projects.title: Happy-Chen-CH / text_classification
projects.description: This is a text classification project based on the "Category News" feature of Toutiao. Initially, we used the random forest algorithm, then upgraded to FastText, and finally built a new text classification model using a BERT pre-trained model with an added fully connected layer.There may still contain several bugs—let's work together to fix them.
